title: Junior Business Development Manager at NHB

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at NHB
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
